shellReady: Foundation shell ready for future modules, APIs, and workflows.
unauthorizedDescription: Your current role does not have permission to access this route.
notFoundDescription: The requested page does not exist or has not been connected yet.
placeholderMessage: This module is intentionally lightweight for now. UI details and logic will be added later.
emptyDescription: Connect an API or add module-specific UI when the implementation phase starts.
themeNote: RTL and localization are active from the foundation layer.
